Solar system

Azuron

Destroyed

System Map

2D placement from body coordinates and orbit data. Yellow rings are elite zones; station, boss, and spawner markers are clickable when a page exists. Use the mouse wheel to zoom and drag to pan.

Hover a marker to inspect location, spawner, boss, or elite-zone data.
SunStationBodySpawnerBoss

Overview

GalaxyAntor System
StatusDestroyedNot selectable on the game star map unless it is the current system.
Coordinates7.5, 0.25
PvP disabledNo
Locations6

Destroyed System

The game client hard-codes Azuron as destroyed in SolarSystem.isDestroyed(). The wiki keeps the page visible so players can still inspect the remaining data, lore hooks, locations, and links.

Not selectable on the game star map unless it is the current system.

Connected Systems

These are the travel links from the game's WarpPaths table. Open the target system to continue following the route network.
